name: Freshness Policy
description: Attach a Dagster FreshnessPolicy to an asset for continuous SLA monitoring

fail_window_hours.label: Fail Window (hours)
fail_window_hours.description: [time_window] Hours after which the asset is stale and fails

warn_window_hours.label: Warn Window (hours)
warn_window_hours.description: [time_window] Hours after which a warning is raised

deadline_cron.label: Deadline Cron
deadline_cron.description: [cron] Cron expression for the materialization deadline

lower_bound_delta_hours.label: Lower Bound Delta (hours)
lower_bound_delta_hours.description: [cron] Hours before deadline when the materialization window opens

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: [cron] Timezone for the cron expression. Defaults to UTC.
